## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Changes

- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `uv run pre-commit run --all-files` or my pre-commit hook ran it
- [ ] I added or updated tests where relevant
- [ ] I updated documentation where relevant
- [ ] I checked that no secrets, API keys, or local config files are committed
- [ ] I considered error handling and observability
- [ ] I considered whether this change affects deployment or infrastructure

## Notes for Reviewers

If you have time, please either manually test yourself or run the unit tests!
